title: aster nuttallii var. fendleri
intro: Aster nuttallii var. fendleri, also known as Fendler's aster or prairie aster, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Fendler's aster is used for its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture by herbalists to harness its medicinal properties.
